prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.9 kg; Height 166.9 cm; BMI 24.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/68 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 175mg/dL; 6 months ago 191mg/dL; 3 months ago 198mg/dL; current 130mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.8kg; 9 months ago 66.8kg; 6 months ago 63.8kg; 3 months ago 63.9kg; current 66.9kg), Height (12 months ago 166.9cm; 9 months ago 166.9cm; 6 months ago 166.9cm; 3 months ago 166.9cm; current 166.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 68mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 59U/L; 9 months ago 57U/L; 6 months ago 44U/L; 3 months ago 48U/L; current 57U/L), AST (12 months ago 43U/L; 9 months ago 40U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 48U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; current 34mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 153mg/g; 9 months ago 206mg/g; 6 months ago 215mg/g; 3 months ago 230mg/g; current 142mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 154mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.4g/dL; 9 months ago 10.7g/dL; 6 months ago 11.4g/dL; 3 months ago 11.3g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
